name: O.R.C. Cockroach Queen
description: The O.R.C. Cockroach Queen is a required elite encounter that already lives near boss territory even if Aphidex does not classify it as a formal boss. It takes the normal queen as a base and hardens it with better space control, more pressure, and an even nastier headless phase.
behavior: It takes over the arena as the centerpiece of the encounter. It does not need much movement to control space: between its body, acid, and headless transition, it forces you to play around it almost all the time.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks the moment you enter range and almost never lets the fight breathe. The classic mistake is thinking the final stretch will just be a tired version of phase one, when the headless portion is actually what fully justifies its extreme rank.
interactionWithCreatures: Nearby O.R.C. roaches and nymphs orbit around her as support, but the queen is clearly the center of the threat.
strategy: When the arena allows it, clear the support first and do not spend every resource on the first takedown. Fresh and Spicy help, but what really defines the fight is reaching the headless reset with room and healing left, because that is where the encounter is truly won or lost.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 50. 3-Hit Combo Bite: 50. Side Kick: 45. Body Slam: 60. Acid Spray: 50. Headless Ram: 45. Headless Acid Spray: 30.

inflicts: Its acid spray inflicts burning, and its heaviest body attacks count as busting damage.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A direct bite used to open pressure when you stay in front of her.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Bite
abilities.description: She chains several short bites if she sees that you are still trapped in front of her.

abilities.name: Side Kick
abilities.description: She swings sideways to catch players trying to circle around or punish from the flank.

abilities.name: Body Slam
abilities.description: She drops or throws her whole body forward to crush you and break close spacing.

abilities.name: Acid Spray
abilities.description: She spits acid to close escape paths and cover the floor with lingering damage.

abilities.name: Headless Ram
abilities.description: After reviving, she throws herself forward in a more violent direct ram.

abilities.name: Headless Acid Spray
abilities.description: During the headless stretch the body launches a nastier acid spray that still inflicts burning and punishes slow healing harder.

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.summary: The O.R.C. version opens as an enhanced queen, using the same bite, body, and acid core but with heavier pressure and fewer safe windows.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A direct bite used to open pressure when you stay in front of her.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Bite
abilities.description: She chains several short bites if she sees that you are still trapped in front of her.

abilities.name: Side Kick
abilities.description: She swings sideways to catch players trying to circle around or punish from the flank.

abilities.name: Body Slam
abilities.description: She drops or throws her whole body forward to crush you and break close spacing.

abilities.name: Acid Spray
abilities.description: She spits acid to close escape paths and cover the floor with lingering damage.

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.summary: After decapitation it keeps advancing like an out-of-control O.R.C. machine, preserving the body pressure and swapping into headless charges and nastier acid.
bossPhases.trigger: Begins when the O.R.C. version loses its head but remains active for the final stretch.
